ats_result.grade_detail: Good match with a few skill or keyword gaps to address.

experience.preview: Senior Software Engineer — TechCorp Inc.                       2021 – Present • Designed and deployed microservices using Python (FastAPI) and Docker on AWS ECS • Built real-time data pipelines with A

projects.preview: Resume ATS Pipeline (2024) • Built an NLP pipeline in Python to analyse resumes against job descriptions • Used TF-IDF keyword extraction and cosine similarity for JD matching

improvements.suggestion: Add or highlight these skills missing from your resume: api, flink, gcp, grafana, mongodb. Include them in your Skills section and weave them into experience bullet points.
The JD references certifications not found in your resume: devops engineer. Pursue or list any equivalent credentials you hold.
You have skills not mentioned in the JD (airflow, apache, django, fastapi). Keep them but ensure JD-required skills are more prominently featured.
